title: No Night Vision Flickering
description: This mod changes night vision flickering/flashing when status effect is expiring to gentle fade-out animation over last 5 seconds(configurable)
body:
Very simple mod that changes Vanilla Flickering happening over last 10 seconds of **Night Vision**, to gentle fade out over 5 seconds.

  

 ![No Night Vision Flickering Fade Out GIF](https://imgur.com/S2zBLrJ.gif)

_Shouldn't cause any issues compatibility issues except for mods trying achieve the same thing:_

_Only affected method is: GameRenderer.getNightVisionStrength();  at TAIL._
